fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip:
Contains the name of the table to which the comment applies.
The program has entered the table name from the card.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the line number of the comment.
When you create a comment for a card, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the comments in the comment table. The line number is specific to the particular comment.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the comment.
